sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66088" key="meliterph/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελῐτερπής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n66088.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">honey-sweet</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μολπή</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:184:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">184.9</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
